title: HubSpot to ActiveCampaign Automation
desc: AI-powered deal routing syncs leads between HubSpot and ActiveCampaign based on email engagement and deal stage — zero manual work.

title: Pipedrive to Zendesk CRM-to-Support Sync
desc: Contacts and organizations created in Zendesk instantly when a deal changes stage. No copy-paste, no missed handoffs.

title: Close CRM to ClickUp Client Onboarding
desc: Automatically create ClickUp tasks and client records when a deal closes in Close CRM — no manual project setup.

title: AI Email Parser & Auto-Reply
desc: AI parses incoming emails, extracts structured data, sends smart auto-replies, and logs everything to Google Sheets — fully hands-free.

title: Close CRM to GoHighLevel & Encharge Tag Sync
desc: Sync contact tags between Close CRM, GoHighLevel, and Encharge. Leads created, tagged, and enrolled in sequences the moment they enter your CRM.

title: AI Concierge with CRM Memory
desc: 24/7 AI assistant that remembers full conversation history, qualifies leads by intent, and syncs every interaction to your CRM.

title: Web Directory Scraper & Lead Enricher
desc: Automatically scrape online employee directories across all pages, extract structured contact data, and export to Google Sheets for outreach.

title: Google Sheets to DocuSeal Bulk E-Signature
desc: Send hundreds of signature requests in minutes. Auto-fills PDF forms from spreadsheet data and routes them for digital signing.

title: Automated PDF Form Filler
desc: Fill PDF forms from Google Sheets data and send for e-signature. Process hundreds of contracts without touching a single file manually.

title: Receipt Scanning & Expense Automation
desc: Automate employee receipt submission end-to-end. AI extracts vendor and date, auto-organizes files in Google Drive for instant expense reports.

title: GoHighLevel Sales & Onboarding Pipelines
desc: Dual pipelines with stage-based automations — proposal follow-ups, SMS/email sequencing, internal tasks, and dashboard reporting.

title: CRM to Production Sync with Guardrails
desc: Deal stage triggers production record creation with margin validation, labor budget caps, change order bidirectional sync, and dashboards.

title: Call Accounting Webhook Logger
desc: Ingests dialer webhook events, checks for duplicates, tags them, and logs structured call activity to Google Sheets.

title: AI Blog Post Generator
desc: Form or Sheet input to polished long-form blog post. Iterates recursively up to 8 times per paragraph for clarity and human-sounding output.

title: CSV Export to Sheet Reconciler
desc: Export, transform with RegEx via Google AppScript, and sync back to Sheets. Eliminates manual reconciliation across platforms.

title: Close CRM to AgencyHandy Client Onboarding
desc: Deal won in Close CRM triggers client record creation in AgencyHandy. Tasks and next steps sync as deals move through CRM stages.

title: Shopify Top-Sellers Collection Builder
desc: Downloads Shopify sales for the last 30 days and automatically updates a collection for top-selling products — no manual merchandising.

title: Shopify Matrixify Bulk Update Pipeline
desc: Export product data via Matrixify, enrich based on rules and lookup tables, and import updates back. Saves hours on bulk product management.

title: MSP Ticket Data Extractor
desc: Connects to ConnectWise, extracts structured ticket data to Google Sheets for AI analysis, RAG ingestion, or knowledge base building.

title: Smart Email Intake & Logger
desc: Gmail label watcher uses GPT to extract structured data fields from every email, logs to Google Sheets for enrichment or order entry workflows.
